pixellabSession.contentPolicyResolution: Enemy prompt was reprompted with safe non-human game-obstacle/pose language and completed; later class-card/pose attempts were rejected as unusable source quality rather than account/security blockers, so final accepted polish source came from ChatGPT Images.

notes: Normal gameplay no longer reads as a blank prototype board: it shows broad generated-source terrain, large recognizable set pieces, and compact HUD/default proof labels hidden.
Build-select locked class cards now use ChatGPT Images production-source miniatures mechanically cropped into the south idle card rows, with card scale retuned for the 80px roster contract.
Starter enemy families now use three distinct coherent pose frames from a ChatGPT Images enemy animation source board instead of repeating one stable PixelLab silhouette.
Accord Striker remains PixelLab Character-backed for the full 4-direction walking sheet and default M49 roster bridge.
Large prop collision remains proofed through milestone11-art terminal edge coverage; render_game_to_text() and advanceTime() remain available.
remainingBeforeExpansion: Armistice passes the current generated-source visual gate; broadening may proceed only by carrying the same source/provenance/proof pipeline forward.
Future quality work should still replace non-south locked-class gameplay rows with dedicated PixelLab/ChatGPT full animation sheets before those classes become playable by default.
